root.rep_text: บัญชีแยกประเภท
root.sql: select VR_DEP_M_ACC_TYPE_MONTH.* , substr(c_month,1,4)::int + 543 as account_year , substr(c_month,6,2) as account_month , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name( substr(c_month,6,2)::int , 'ST' ) as account_month_thai from VR_DEP_M_ACC_TYPE_MONTH where 1=1 and trim(substr(c_month,1,4))::int = '!account_year!' and trim(substr(c_month,6,2))::int = '!account_month!' /*WHERE*/ order by substr(c_month,1,4) , substr(c_month,6,2) , account_id
